## Purpose
This file provides utility functions for hashing file and text content using different algorithms.

## User-Visible Behavior
Users can call the `hashFileContent` function to get an MD5 hash of a string representing file content, and the `hashTextContent` function to get a SHA-256 hash of a string representing text content.

## Business Rules
The `hashFileContent` function uses the MD5 hashing algorithm, while the `hashTextContent` function uses the SHA-256 hashing algorithm. Both functions expect input as a string and return the hash as a hexadecimal string.

## Data Inputs And Outputs
The `hashFileContent` function takes a string `fileContent` as input and outputs a string representing the MD5 hash. The `hashTextContent` function takes a string `textContent` as input and outputs a string representing the SHA-256 hash.

## Side Effects
None identified.

## Error And Edge Cases
None identified.

## Dependencies
The file imports the `createHash` function from the `node:crypto` module to perform hashing operations.

## Operational Notes
None identified.
